name: Flip
scaffolding_intent: Entity compresses and lurches forward then freezes mid-motion, scaffolding missing or uncompleted action verbs

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: Speed multiplier for the flip animation

correction_intent: Child described the WRONG ACTION for an entity (e.g. said 'cooking' when the entity is packing, said 'sleeping' when it's reading). A2 is for any non-movement action error — wrong verb, wrong activity, incomplete action description.
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't described a NON-MOVEMENT action happening in the scene (cooking, reading, talking, packing, etc.). Use A2 for static/in-place actions — for locomotion (walking, running) use A1.
